summary: The diff implements all six requirements with high fidelity. Backend model (REQ-1), navigation tabs (REQ-2), PregnantWomenPage (REQ-3), PregnantWomanCard (REQ-4), dummy data (REQ-5), and gestational calculation utilities (REQ-6) are all present. One minor gap exists: the backend does not expose explicit query endpoints filtering by risk level or trimester (REQ-1 AC). A file added to frontend/src/hooks/ (useQueries.ts) technically touches the protected directory, but this appears to be a new file addition rather than modification of an existing hook file. No significant hallucinated features were found.

missing_requirements.requirement: Records can be queried by risk level and trimester
missing_requirements.reason: The backend (backend/main.mo) exposes getAllPregnancyRecords and addPregnancyRecord/addVisit, but no dedicated query functions for filtering by risk level or trimester are visible in the diff. Filtering appears to be done client-side only in PregnantWomenPage.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: A urlParams.ts utility file with URL parameter parsing, sessionStorage persistence, and hash-based routing helpers was added, which was not requested in the build spec.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request contains no mention of URL parameter utilities, sessionStorage helpers, or hash-based routing parameter management.
